auth_notes: Requires Twilio Account SID and Auth Token, both available on the main Twilio Console dashboard.
rate_limits: Twilio uses a concurrency model rather than a strict RPS for the REST API (typically 100 concurrent requests). SMS throughput is limited by the sender type: 1 message per second (MPS) for standard long codes and up to 100 MPS for short codes.
gotchas: A2P 10DLC registration is mandatory for sending SMS to US numbers; unregistered traffic is subject to heavy filtering or blocking.
Trial accounts append 'Sent from a Twilio Trial account' to all messages and can only send to verified numbers.
Webhook responses for voice calls require TwiML (XML) format, which may require an 'HTTP Request' node or 'Code' node to generate correctly if not using the native 'Twilio Trigger'.
research_notes: Twilio is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While the node setup is simple, the majority of implementation time is usually spent on regulatory compliance (10DLC) and handling asynchronous message status updates via webhooks.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Twilio is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While the node setup is simple, the majority of implementation time is usually spent on regulatory compliance (10DLC) and handling asynchronous message status updates via webhooks.
